data.name: Nemesis

weaponImprint.name: .50 Nemesis
weaponImprint.trait: Attacks ignore 1 point of Stability Index. When possessing [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], additionally ignore another 1 point of Stability Index.
weaponImprint.effect: If the target's current HP percentage is above 90%/70%/50%/30%/30%/30%, increases damage dealt to them by 10%/12%/15%/15%/18%/20%.

data.effects: Passionate in mysticism and divination, she always carries a magical divination tool known as the "Prism". Her divination results are often expressed in a cryptic and enigmatic manner. Though she can be difficult to communicate with, she remains a dependable companion.

skills.name: Victory Portent
skills.description: Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Remote Observation
skills.description: At the start of the action, marks the 2 nearest enemy targets within range with [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200] for 1 turn. [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] deals physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. This unit gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 1 turn after using a [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3].
skills.descriptionLevel2: At the start of the action, marks the 2 nearest enemy targets within range with [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200] for 2 turns. [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] deals physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. This unit gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 1 turn after using a [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3].
skills.descriptionLevel3: At the start of the action, marks the 2 nearest enemy targets within range with [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200] for 2 turns. [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] deals physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. This unit gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] for 1 turn after using a [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3]. When this unit is under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], increases damage dealt by 10%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increases the duration of [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200] by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When this unit is under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], increases damage dealt by 10%.

skills.name: Enlightened Star
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles of the user and deal Physical damage equal to 130% of attack. When attacking near Cover, increase damage dealt by 20% and gain 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy target within 9 tiles of the user and deal Physical damage equal to 130% of attack. When attacking near Cover, increase damage dealt by 20% and gain 2 points of Confectance Index. If the target has [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200], increase damage dealt by 10%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Select 1 enemy target within 9 tiles of the user and deal physical damage equal to 130% of attack. When attacking near Cover, increase damage dealt by 20% and gain 2 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target has [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200], increase damage dealt 10%.

skills.name: Penetrating Casket
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] for 1 turn, and deals Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to them.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] for 1 turn, and deals Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to them. If the target is already inflicted with a defense debuff, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Gains 1 point of Confectance Index if the target has a defense debuff.

skills.name: Stellar Pursuit
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 times, dealing Corrosion damage equal to 170% of attack of them. For each additional 1 point of Confectance Index, this attack's damage is increased by 10%.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 times, dealing Corrosion damage equal to 170% of attack of them. For each additional 1 point of Confectance Index, increases damage dealt by 10%. When under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], increases the damage multiplier by 10%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 times, dealing Corrosion damage equal to 170% of attack of them, For each additional point of Confectance Index, increases damage dealt by 10%. When under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], increases the damage multiplier by 10%. For each debuff on the target, increases critical rate by 20%, up to 100%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: When [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194] is active, increases the damage multiplier by 10%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: For each debuff on the target, increases critical rate by 20%, up to 100%.

keys.effect: When this unit is under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], gain 3 additional tiles of movement after killing an enemy target.
keys.displayTitle: Common Key - Blessing of the Morning Star

keys.effect: At the start of the turn, applies [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200] to the enemy unit within range with the highest HP.
If the enemy target is marked with [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200], apply [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] before launching an active attack.
When this unit is under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], the range of the active skills Enlightened Star and Penetrating Casket are increased by 1 tile.
If there is Cover nearby while under the effect of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], reduce AoE damage taken by 20%.
When killing a target marked with [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200], gain [effect:90e40fd3-e06c-4dca-aa63-464cf6e0c9f7] and [effect:6fd51e21-f25d-4ef4-b554-e00aef225a58] for 1 turn.
When a target marked with [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200] is killed by this unit, gain 1 point of Confectance Index.
When this unit is under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], gain immunity to all displacement effects from enemy units.

vertebrae.effect: Increases the duration of [effect:a3c3e7a1-4b80-4255-a11d-f116ac7ae200] by 1 turn.

doll.name: Nemesis
doll.effects: Passionate in mysticism and divination, she always carries a magical divination tool known as the "Prism". Her divination results are often expressed in a cryptic and enigmatic manner. Though she can be difficult to communicate with, she remains a dependable companion.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by Support Attacks is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt against enemy units that are more than 5 tiles away is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Upon receiving targeted damage, Nemesis performs [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] and gains 2 points of Confectance Index. This effect activates once, cannot be cleansed.
